product_overview: A secure REST API to manage laboratory tests (CRUD) including test catalog operations used by clinical and administrative clients. The API exposes endpoints for listing, creating, updating, and deleting lab tests with authentication and validation.
core_goals: Provide CRUD operations for lab tests with clear request/response contracts.
Enforce authentication and authorization for all lab management endpoints.
Return consistent success and error responses (status codes and payload structure).
Validate input to prevent malformed or duplicate lab test records.
Make the API suitable for integration by web/mobile clients and administrative UIs.

features.name: Lab Service API
features.description: Manage lab tests (list, create, update, delete). Endpoints require authentication and return structured success/error responses.
user_flows: POST /api/auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token
GET /labs/tests/ with Authorization: Bearer <token> -> Receive 200 with { success: boolean, data: array, total_count: int } (happy path listing)
GET /labs/tests/ without Authorization header -> Receive 401 Unauthorized (error: missing/invalid token)
POST /api/auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token

POST /labs/tests/ with Authorization: Bearer <token> and body { "test_code": "CBC001", "test_name": "Complete Blood Count", "category_id": 2, "price": 25.00, "sample_type": "Blood" } -> Receive 201 with { success: true, data: { ...created_test... }, message: string } (happy path create)
POST /api/auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token
POST /labs/tests/ with Authorization: Bearer <token> and body missing required field (e.g., no test_code) -> Receive 400 with validation error details (error flow create)
POST /api/auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token
PUT /labs/tests/123/ with Authorization: Bearer <token> and body { "price": 30.00 } -> Receive 200 with { success: true, data: { ...updated_test... }, message: string } (happy path update)
POST /api/auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token
PUT /labs/tests/99999/ with Authorization: Bearer <token> and body { "price": 30.00 } -> Receive 404 Not Found with error message (error flow update: non-existent test_id)
POST /api/auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token
DELETE /labs/tests/123/ with Authorization: Bearer <token> -> Receive 200 with { success: true, message: string } (happy path delete)
DELETE /labs/tests/123/ without Authorization header -> Receive 401 Unauthorized (error flow delete: missing token)

features.name: Lab Service API
features.description: CRUD operations for lab tests, categories, and parameters

response_schema.200: { success: boolean, data: array, total_count: int }

response_schema.201: { success: boolean, data: object, message: string }

response_schema.200: { success: boolean, data: object, message: string }
